behavior_summary: This script implements the NPC Torwin's U8P_TORWIN::look/description, U8P_TORWIN::schedule-driven world behavior, area-entry/exit housekeeping, reaction to theft and attacks, and a full player conversation handler with dynamic menu options and item/FX utilities.
U8P_TORWIN::look() returns a single short descriptive line for the player (dead vs alive and name/title variants) using torwinName and torwinJob flags.

U8P_TORWIN::schedule() computes a runtime U8P_TORWIN::schedule id (torwinSchedule) from time-of-day and a forced flag (torwinGottaJump) and calls engine AI helpers to apply the selected U8P_TORWIN::schedule.

U8P_TORWIN::enterFastArea()/U8P_TORWIN::leaveFastArea() clear transient references, handle teleport-on-death, and dispatch the NPC into the branch appropriate for torwinSchedule (U8P_TORWIN::func0C23, U8P_TORWIN::func0531, or METHOD::func15E7).

U8P_TORWIN::use() is the comprehensive conversation entry: it builds a dynamic menu (local1), captures the player's choice (local2), branches dialog, and calls utility routines that spawn items/effects and orchestrate auxiliary processes.

U8P_TORWIN::AvatarStoleSomething(uword) triggers a theft-reaction sequence only when torwinSchedule indicates the confrontation U8P_TORWIN::schedule; it clears refs, prepares/faces the player, barks, spawns effects and continues via an internal follow-up.

U8P_TORWIN::cast(uword) handles being targeted/attacked: a non-fatal branch spawns limited reaction effects, while param==1 triggers an immortal-clear and death sequence (effects, clear immortal, set dead, teleport).
notable_control_flow: U8P_TORWIN::look(): if Npc::isDead(this) -> return 'Torwin the ex-monk'; else U8P_TORWIN::use torwinName/torwinJob boolean flags in priority to pick one of four short barks.

U8P_TORWIN::schedule(): skip if dead; choose local constants based on FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod or torwinGottaJump; call METHOD::func143A; on process_result() commit local4 -> torwinSchedule and call METHOD::func133F.

U8P_TORWIN::enterFastArea(): clear refs; if dead call Npc::teleport(random offsets); switch on torwinSchedule: 0x01 -> U8P_TORWIN::func0C23, 0x02 -> U8P_TORWIN::func0531, default -> METHOD::func15E7 + suspend.

U8P_TORWIN::use(): if torwinGottaJump take special fast branch (clear refs, set stasis, pathfind/teleport); otherwise begin conversation (beginConversationNoMap or BeginConversation depending on last anim set), build menu (local1) by union/removing entries depending on flags, Ask -> suspendAssign(local2) -> dispatch chosen dialog/actions.

U8P_TORWIN::func0531/U8P_TORWIN::func0C23/U8P_TORWIN::func0623/U8P_TORWIN::func0E31 form U8P_TORWIN::schedule-specific behavior chains: pathfind->on success call monologue heads (U8P_TORWIN::func0623/U8P_TORWIN::func0E31) when nobodyTalking, otherwise fallback to METHOD::func15E7. Random selectors (urandom) pick barks. Spawns (FREE::func1C19/func29D8) used for timed effects between steps.
open_questions: Exact mapping of torwinSchedule numeric values (0x00,0x01,0x02) to named behaviors — inferred but not definitively labeled.
Identity and implementation of U8P_TORWIN::func022D (called by U8P_TORWIN::AvatarStoleSomething) is not present in the extracted function list — its exact role is unknown.
Precise semantics of some METHOD::* engine helpers (func15E7, func143A, func133F, func091C) are inferred (face player / idle / commit U8P_TORWIN::schedule) but not certain.
Which global variable(s) constitute 'somebodyTalking' and exact scopes/ownership of transient reference IDs (0x0205,0x0204,0x00F0,0x0200) beyond their bookkeeping role.

main_function.name: U8P_TORWIN::look
main_function.purpose: Provide a short descriptive line for the player when examining Torwin; differentiates a dead/ex-monk label from alive variants and chooses between personal name and job/title based on persistent flags.
entry_conditions: Player performs 'U8P_TORWIN::look' / examine action on the NPC
Immediate check for Npc::isDead(this) to return the dead description

function_map.name: U8P_TORWIN::schedule
function_map.role: periodic U8P_TORWIN::schedule computation and assignment to torwinSchedule

function_map.name: U8P_TORWIN::enterFastArea
function_map.role: area-entry trigger: cleanup, teleport-on-death, dispatch to U8P_TORWIN::schedule behavior

function_map.name: U8P_TORWIN::AvatarStoleSomething
function_map.role: theft reaction sequence (monologue) triggered with a uword param

function_map.name: U8P_TORWIN::cast
function_map.role: handle spell/attack U8P_TORWIN::cast at NPC; non-fatal reaction and fatal (param==1) death/immortal-clear path

function_map.name: U8P_TORWIN::func0531
function_map.role: pathfinding/behavior loop used by one U8P_TORWIN::schedule branch; on success calls U8P_TORWIN::func0623

function_map.name: U8P_TORWIN::func0C23
function_map.role: meditation behavior for a U8P_TORWIN::schedule branch; may call U8P_TORWIN::func0E31

function_map.name: U8P_TORWIN::func0E31
function_map.role: alternate monologue/idle routine for another U8P_TORWIN::schedule

function_map.name: U8P_TORWIN::use
function_map.role: full player conversation handler: build menu, capture choice, run dialog and utility side-effects

function_map.name: U8P_TORWIN::func3725
function_map.role: item creation/placement utility used by dialog/behavior

function_map.name: U8P_TORWIN::func383B
function_map.role: short reset / SFX helper sequence for conversation/reactions

internal_calls.purpose: Dispatch U8P_TORWIN::schedule branch when torwinSchedule == 0x01 (meditative behavior)
Dispatch U8P_TORWIN::schedule branch when torwinSchedule == 0x02 (movement/pathfind branch)
Continue theft reaction via an internal follow-up routine (inferred continuation)
After successful pathfind and if nobodyTalking, hand off to monologue routine
On some random branch and if nobodyTalking, continue into a longer monologue routine
Spawn/give items or otherwise perform item side-effect during conversation
Reset refs and play SFX as a dialog side-effect
Start a timed helper/effect sequence from within conversation

external_calls.purpose: Check whether Torwin is dead to choose the appropriate 'U8P_TORWIN::look' description
Get current time-of-day period to pick U8P_TORWIN::schedule branch constants
Invoke engine/AI step to apply or test chosen U8P_TORWIN::schedule parameters (suspend and check process_result())
Finalize/persist newly selected torwinSchedule after process_result()
Reposition Torwin (used when NPC is dead or during some fast-branch transitions)
Spawn a pathfinding process to move Torwin to a waypoint; success drives behavior handoff
Measure proximity to decide close-range vs fallback barks and behavior
Begin conversation UI (variant chosen based on Npc::getLastAnimSet)
Set an active confrontational activity/process when theft id matches (change NPC activity)
Clear immortal flag so NPC can be killed (fatal branch)
Mark the NPC dead as part of the fatal/param==1 sequence
Spawn short-lived effect/timer helper processes used throughout the script for delays and FX
Engine helpers used before barks (face-player/prep) and as short idle/wait actions between dialog lines

external_calls.callee: Item::create / Item::pop / Item::getZ / Item::getX / Item::getY / Item::getType / Item::isNpc / Item::push
external_calls.purpose: Create/place and validate items produced by the item-creation utility

reads.name: torwinName
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether Torwin's personal name is shown in U8P_TORWIN::look() and influences menu options in U8P_TORWIN::use()

reads.name: torwinJob
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether Torwin's job/title ('monk') is shown in U8P_TORWIN::look() and influences conversation options

reads.name: torwinSchedule
reads.likely_effect: Read by U8P_TORWIN::enterFastArea and behavior functions to choose which behavior branch runs

reads.name: torwinGottaJump
reads.likely_effect: Forces special fast/escape U8P_TORWIN::schedule branch and alters U8P_TORWIN::use()/U8P_TORWIN::schedule() behavior when set

reads.name: torwinMet
reads.likely_effect: Gates first-meet dialog variants and menu options; set on first conversation

reads.name: torwinPissed
reads.likely_effect: When set modifies greeting/bark choices during U8P_TORWIN::use() (annoyed/hostile variants)

reads.name: passedTests
reads.likely_effect: Used to add a menu option when the player completed certain tests

reads.name: somebodyTalking
reads.likely_effect: Global guard preventing monologue routines from interrupting active conversations

writes.name: torwinSchedule
writes.likely_effect: Assigned by U8P_TORWIN::schedule() to commit the chosen runtime behavior branch

writes.name: torwinMet
writes.likely_effect: Set to true the first time the player converses with Torwin (marks 'met' state)

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the NPC Torwin's U8P_TORWIN::look/description, U8P_TORWIN::schedule-driven world behavior, area-entry/exit housekeeping, reaction to theft and attacks, and a full player conversation handler with dynamic menu options and item/FX utilities.
